Welcome To Our Studio!
It's Nice To Meet You
Explore Products

  • 2009-2011

    Our Humble Beginnings

    We started with a small team, a simple mission, and a belief that thoughtful design can create real business value.

  • March 2011

    An Agency is Born

    As our projects grew, we built a clearer process for strategy, design, development, and long-term partnership.

  • December 2015

    Transition to Full Service

    We expanded from visual execution into a full-service model covering content, systems, and digital touchpoints.

  • July 2020

    Phase Two Expansion

    By investing in stronger delivery and communication, we were able to support bigger launches and more complex work.

  • Be Part
    Of Our
    Story!

Business Contact

Fast Response for Industrial Sealing Needs

For oil seals, O-rings, hydraulic seals, and rubber custom parts, you can reach us directly by phone, email, QQ, or WeChat for efficient technical and commercial communication.

Copyright © Your Website 2023
Privacy Policy Terms of Use

Mechanical Equipment

Sealing support for industrial machinery, transmission systems, and automated equipment.

Mechanical equipment often runs under continuous loads, dust exposure, and complex motion conditions. Our sealing and rubber components help improve equipment stability, reduce leakage risk, and support long-term operation in industrial production environments.

  • Industry: Mechanical Equipment
  • Application: Industrial Machinery

Automotive

Reliable sealing for engine systems, chassis assemblies, and vehicle durability requirements.

Automotive applications demand consistency under vibration, temperature cycling, and fluid exposure. Our products are suitable for sealing interfaces, vibration control, and component protection in both passenger and commercial vehicle systems.

  • Industry: Automotive
  • Application: Vehicle Systems

Petrochemical

Materials and sealing support for aggressive media, pressure systems, and process equipment.

Petrochemical environments place strict demands on chemical resistance, pressure retention, and service reliability. Our sealing solutions help process equipment maintain integrity across pipelines, pumps, valves, and related process units.

  • Industry: Petrochemical
  • Application: Chemical Processing

Electronics

Precision sealing and protection for compact assemblies and sensitive electronic structures.

Electronic products often require small-size, high-precision components with stable insulation and sealing performance. Our rubber and sealing parts can support connectors, housings, sensors, and other compact assemblies.

  • Industry: Electronics
  • Application: Precision Components

Electrical Appliances

Rubber and sealing components for appliances, motors, controls, and enclosure systems.

Electrical appliances require dependable sealing, cushioning, and insulation in compact spaces. Our products can be integrated into home appliances and industrial electrical equipment to improve assembly reliability and service life.

  • Industry: Electrical Appliances
  • Application: Home & Industrial Appliances

Shipbuilding & Maintenance Manufacturing

Heavy-duty sealing support for marine systems, repair workshops, and ship component manufacturing.

Shipbuilding and maintenance manufacturing demand materials that tolerate salt mist, heavy loads, and harsh operational environments. Our products can support hatch systems, pumps, pipelines, and maintenance assemblies in marine applications.

  • Industry: Shipbuilding & Maintenance Manufacturing
  • Application: Marine Systems
